dis_application_view.llm_summary: Karan Singh is a IN national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by My India Ltd TA Mother India for IT quality and testing professionals (SOC 2136). The application states salary £41,700 against the SOC going rate £41,200 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS routes the case to manual review because exact_general_salary_floor. The officer should inspect the linked evidence and use the RFI flow where further evidence is needed.
